domain: Ndebele house mural painting (S. African women-led; triangles + chevrons + rhombuses with sharp-edged geometric formations; strict symmetry + repetition; each house pattern conveys family status / prayer / protest)
specific_mechanism: Weight tensor discretised onto triangular mesh (rows/columns as vertices, edges = strongly-correlated pairs); regularizer penalises off-equilateral edge-length variance; vertex-degree anomalies flagged as topological defects.
llm_application: NDEBELE-TRIANGLE: a topological-defect detector for weight-tensor anomalies. Construct a triangular mesh M_W over an LLM weight matrix W where (i) vertices = rows/columns of W, (ii) edges connect pairs with cosine similarity ≥ τ, (iii) triangles are formed from triple-connected vertex-sets. A geometric-symmetry regularizer R(W) = Var(edge-lengths) + |6 - mean_vertex_degree| is added at training time; at inference, vertices with degree ≠ 6 (in a regular triangulation) or unusual edge-length triangle are flagged as TOPOLOGICAL DEFECTS — anomalous-weight signatures correlated with hallucination/adversarial vulnerability. Differs from Learning Geometry 2510.26068 (manifold metric only, no defect detector), TOHA (attention-graph not weight-tensor), KULA-PARITY R423 (attention parity not weight mesh) by combining (a) WEIGHT-TENSOR triangulation, (b) EQUILATERAL-SYMMETRY regularizer, (c) DEFECT-VERTEX-DEGREE detector.
novelty_claim: Learning Geometry Manifold + TOHA + Logical Determinism Topological Reconstruction + LapEigvals already cover geometric/topological LLM analysis. NDEBELE-TRIANGLE recombines weight-tensor mesh + symmetry regularizer + defect detector. Recombination.
